    • April 13, 2021—Baseline
    • March 9, 2021—Hotpatch KB5001080 (OS Build 17784.1588)

    Release notes for Hotpatch on Windows 11 Enterprise version 25H2

    Applies To
    Windows 11 Enterprise LTSC 2024

    Hotpatch for Windows 11 Enterprise, version 25H2 gives organizations the ability to apply security updates without requiring a device restart. This helps maintain security while keeping workflows uninterrupted. 

    Hotpatch is an extension of Windows Update and requires Autopatch to create and deploy updates to devices enrolled in the Autopatch quality update policy.

    Benefits include:

    • Immediate protection. Hotpatch updates take effect immediately upon installation, providing rapid protection against vulnerabilities

    • Consistent security. Devices receive the same level of security patching as the monthly standard security updates released on the second Tuesday of every month.

    • Minimized disruptions. Users can continue their work without interruptions while Hotpatch updates are installed. Hotpatch updates don't require the PC to restart for the remainder of the quarter.

      Note

      OS features, firmware, or application updates might still require a restart during the quarter.

    Hotpatch updates for calendar year 2026

    Eligible devices must be on the latest baseline release version to qualify for hotpatch updates. Microsoft releases baseline updates quarterly as standard cumulative updates.

    Check the update calendar to view the Hotpatch release for Windows 11 Enterprise, version 25H2.

    January to April

    Hopatch for Windows 11 Enterprise, version 25H2

    Month Update Type Type KB article
    January 2026.01 B Baseline (Restart) KB5074109
    February 2026.02 B Hotpatch KB5077212
    March 2026.03 B Hotpatch KB5079420
    April 2026.04 B Baseline (Restart) KB5083769

    May to August

    Hotpatch for Windows 11 Enterprise, version 25H2

    Month Update Type Type KB article
    May 2026.05 B Hotpatch KB5089466
    June 2026.06 B Baseline (Restart) KB5094126
    July 2026.07 B Baseline (Restart) KB5101650
    August 2026.08 B Hotpatch

    September to December

    Hopatch for Windows 11 Enterprise, version 25H2

    Month Update Type Type KB article
    September 2026.09 B Hotpatch
    October 2026.10 B Baseline (Restart)
    November 2026.11 B Hotpatch
    December 2026.12 B Hotpatch

    Hotpatch updates for calendar year 2025

    View the update release calendar for Windows 11 Enterprise, version 25H2 Hotpatch updates.

    October to December

    Hotpatch for Windows 11 Enterprise, version 25H2

    Month Update Type Type KB article
    October 2025.10 B Baseline (Restart) KB5066835
    November 2025.11 B Hotpatch KB5068966
    December 2025.12 B Hotpatch KB5072014
